nasb.text: If you have been snared with the words of your mouth, Have been caught with the words of your mouth,

esv.text: if you are snared in the words of your mouth, caught in the words of your mouth,

cnv.text: 如果你給自己口裡的話纏累， 給你口裡的話綁住；

ccb.text: 你若被自己口中的话套住， 被自己的诺言缠住，

csbs.text: 因你口中的言语陷入圈套， 因你口中的言语被捉住了——
